title: Thai-Style Skillet Lentils
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired dish made with lentils, vegetables, and a hint of cumin. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: lentils
ingredients.amount: 1 cup dried green or brown lentils, rinsed and drained

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in cumin and chili flakes; cook for 1 minute.
Add lentils, ketchup, and soy sauce; stir to combine.
Bring to a simmer and cook, covered, until the lentils are tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in green onions and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
